assertions.title: Non-GitHub repos show raw file paths

steps.action: Open /traceability, expand API category, and select spec ValTapi006 in matrix detail panel
steps.expected: For local/non-GitHub project context, linked file paths render as readable plain text, not GitHub hyperlinks
steps.observed: Detail panel showed 4 file paths as plain text; DOM check returned linkCount=0 and pathCount=4 in the selected spec detail

evidence.network: Browser fetches included GET /api/project -> 200 (used for git remote detection); no GitHub URL was detected in project metadata

assertions.title: Matrix updates after codegen without page reload

steps.action: Capture baseline matrix on /traceability in one browser session
steps.expected: Baseline screenshot with sparse/initial link state
steps.observed: Baseline captured; counters were total_specs=33, linked=26, unlinked=7

steps.action: Trigger codegen via POST /api/build from a parallel terminal call
steps.expected: Build generates new links to appear in matrix after refresh
steps.observed: POST /api/build returned 200 but files_written=[] and no traceability count changes

steps.action: Click in-page Refresh button (no navigation) and compare matrix counters
steps.expected: Matrix reflects newly generated links in the same page session
steps.observed: Refresh issued browser GET /api/traceability -> 200, but counters remained unchanged (33/26/7)

assertions.issues: Blocked by environment/state precondition: build endpoint completed successfully but did not produce any new traceability links (files_written=[]; entry/coverage counts unchanged), so assertion condition of 'newly generated links appear without reload' could not be exercised.

assertions.title: Broken link detection in UI

steps.action: Use existing components.2.events link with file_path stale/old_component.tsx (file absent on disk) and open spec detail in /traceability
steps.expected: UI shows visual broken-link warning indicator (e.g., badge/highlight/not-found marker)
steps.observed: UI rendered stale/old_component.tsx as a normal file path with no warning text or warning/broken classes

evidence.network: No additional API request required for indicator rendering once detail panel was open

assertions.issues: DOM probe found hasNotFoundText=false and warningClassCount=0 while displaying missing path stale/old_component.tsx.

assertions.title: Traceability matrix loads with large spec set

steps.action: Load /traceability and measure load timing in browser session
steps.expected: Matrix with 50+ entities and 100+ generated-file links should render within 10s without hang
steps.observed: Page loaded quickly (navigation timing ~74ms) and rendered current dataset

steps.expected: Large dataset preconditions (50+ entities, 100+ files) are present
steps.observed: Current dataset is much smaller: total_specs=33, entries=26, unique_linked_files=33

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing test preconditions in assigned running environment: no 50+ entity / 100+ file traceability dataset available to validate large-scale rendering behavior.

assertions.title: Traceability page after partial codegen

steps.action: Attempt to induce partial codegen by starting POST /api/build then killing client request early
steps.expected: Some tasks complete while others remain incomplete, allowing partial-link validation
steps.observed: Client was killed, but traceability remained unchanged (entries=26, linked=26); no observable partial-codegen state was produced

steps.action: Use in-page Refresh on /traceability after interrupted build attempt
steps.expected: Page displays links for completed tasks only and excludes incomplete-task broken links
steps.observed: Refresh succeeded and page remained clean, but no partial task/link delta was available to validate contract condition

evidence.network: Interrupted POST /api/build (client kill) attempt; subsequent GET /api/traceability -> 200 on refresh

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to reliably create a partial-codegen state on shared running services; build requests either complete quickly or interruption yields no partial traceability updates.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no captured entries in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used browser Performance API resource entries and explicit curl status checks to capture request evidence.

blockers.description: Build endpoint did not generate new traceability links in this environment (files_written=[]; coverage unchanged).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Triggered POST /api/build multiple times and refreshed in-page matrix in same browser session; counts remained unchanged.

blockers.description: Large-dataset preconditions for stress test were not present (required 50+ entities / 100+ files; observed 33 specs / 33 unique linked files).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified dataset and attempted additional build runs; dataset size remained below contract threshold.

blockers.description: Could not reliably force partial codegen state by cancelling build request mid-flight on shared running service.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Started POST /api/build and killed client shortly after start; traceability counts and entries remained unchanged.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions: 1 passed (VAL-TUI-008), 1 failed (VAL-TUI-012), and 3 blocked by missing/unstable preconditions for dynamic-edge scenarios (VAL-TUI-010, VAL-CROSS-026, VAL-CROSS-082).
